title: Implement core mesh-to-internet packet forwarding logic in lichen-gateway
description: Update Gateway::mesh_to_upstream and upstream_to_mesh (or add new methods) to handle routing decisions per updated addressing (fe80:: link-local to LoRa neighbor, 02xx:: in local mesh via RPL/LoRa, else to Yggdrasil/Tailscale/backhaul). Integrate with routes HashMap and RPL root state. Add basic IPv6 forwarding without full NAT64 for now.
close_reason: Updated hybrid address classification for 02xx primary addresses per epic notes; core forwarding routing decision now treats them as MeshLocal for mesh-to-internet/Yggdrasil path. Integrated with existing RPL/gradient. cargo test + clippy passed.
